I'll start by reading the essential harness files to understand the current state of the project.

Let me read the progress file first.

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Read">
<parameter name="file_path">/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/claude-progress.txt</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<result>
<document>
<source>file</source>
<title>claude-progress.txt</title>
<content>
# Claude Progress Log

## Session History

### Session 2025-12-16 #6 (HARNESS-001)
**Focus:** Playwright headless mode + security permissions setup

**Completed:**
- Created `.mcp.json` with Playwright MCP in headless mode (prevents focus stealing)
- Created `.claude/settings.local.json` with deny permissions for personal directories
- Updated CLAUDE.md with Security & Permissions section
- Verified Playwright MCP available and working

**Key Decisions:**
- Headless mode: `--headless` flag prevents browser window from stealing focus
- Deny permissions protect: Desktop, Documents, Downloads, Pictures, Movies, Music
- Block commands: `find ~`, `find /Users` to prevent scanning home directories

**Files Modified:**
- `.mcp.json` (created)
- `.claude/settings.local.json` (created)
- `CLAUDE.md` (updated Security & Permissions section)

**Next Session:**
- Continue with production app development (apps/canvas)
- Use Playwright MCP for visual testing (will run headless)

---

### Session 2025-12-16 #5 (O009 + O010)
**Focus:** Orchestrator dashboard and session 5 verification

**Completed:**
- O009: Full session dashboard with terminal UI visualization
- O010: Session 5 verification (all criteria passed)
- Documented complete harness dashboard architecture

**Key Metrics from O010 Verification:**
- features.json: Valid JSON, proper structure with passes boolean
- sessions.json: 5 sessions tracked with proper format
- POC: All console errors resolved (verified via Playwright)
- Documentation: All 8 doc files present and valid

**Files Created:**
- `packages/harness-dashboard/src/index.ts` (terminal UI)
- `packages/harness-dashboard/src/verify-session.ts` (verification tool)
- `packages/harness-dashboard/package.json`

---

### Session 2025-12-16 #4 (Session 4)
**Focus:** Production app setup - Vite + React 18 + BlueprintJS 6 + R3F

**Completed:**
- F101: Vite + React 18 project scaffold ✅
- F102: BlueprintJS 6 integration ✅
- F103: R3F integration (React 18 compatible versions) ✅
- F104: Mock data generator ✅

**Technical Decisions:**
- React 18.3.1 (required for BlueprintJS 6 compatibility)
- @react-three/fiber 8.17.x + @react-three/drei 9.114.x (React 18 compatible)
- three 0.170.x
- Vite 5.4.x with React plugin

**Key Files Created:**
- `apps/canvas/` - Complete production app structure
- `apps/canvas/src/data/types.ts` - Domain type definitions
- `apps/canvas/src/data/generator.ts` - Mock data generator
- `apps/canvas/src/App.tsx` - Main app with BlueprintJS layout
- `apps/canvas/src/canvas/InfiniteCanvas.tsx` - R3F canvas setup

**Current State:**
- Dev server runs: `cd apps/canvas && bun run dev`
- BlueprintJS Navbar renders correctly
- R3F Canvas initializes (placeholder content)
- Mock data generates 50 trains, ~6000 tasks over 10 years

**Next Session Should:**
1. Implement MesoLayer (F105) - InstancedMesh rendering
2. Implement CameraController (F106) - Pan/zoom
3. Visual testing with Playwright MCP

---

### Session 2025-12-16 #3 (Session 3)
**Focus:** POC console errors fix + Documentation

**Completed:**
- Fixed THREE.Geometry deprecation (→ BufferGeometry)
- Fixed THREE.Face3 removal (→ vertex colors)
- Fixed THREE.Line dashed material (→ LineDashedMaterial + computeLineDistances)
- Created all documentation files
- POC now runs with 0 console errors

**Files Modified:**
- `design/reference/semantic-zoom-poc.html` (lines 557, 587, 850-880)

**Documentation Created:**
- `docs/DOMAIN.md` - Complete domain model
- `docs/REQUIREMENTS.md` - Business requirements
- `docs/UX_SPECIFICATION.md` - UX patterns
- `agent_docs/architecture.md` - Technical architecture
- `agent_docs/testing.md` - Testing protocol
- `agent_docs/conventions.md` - Code conventions
- `agent_docs/ai-limitations.md` - AI limitations guide

---

### Session 2025-12-16 #2 (Session 2)
**Focus:** Astro removal + features.json restructure

**Completed:**
- Removed non-functional apps/web (Astro)
- Restructured features.json for production app phases
- Features now F101-F117 for apps/canvas development

**Key Decision:**
- Pure Vite + React 18 + R3F + BlueprintJS stack
- No SSR framework needed for WebGL canvas app

---

### Session 2025-12-16 #1 (Session 1)
**Focus:** Initial harness setup

**Completed:**
- Created claude-progress.txt
- Created features.json with POC features
- Established work protocol

---

## Current Status

### Production App (apps/canvas)
- **Foundation Complete:** Vite + React 18 + BlueprintJS 6 + R3F ✅
- **Data Layer Complete:** Types + Generator ✅
- **Next Phase:** Core rendering (F105-F107)

### Feature Status (from features.json)
```
F101-F104: Foundation     ✅ COMPLETE
F105-F107: Core Rendering ⏳ NEXT
F108-F110: All Layers     ⏳ Pending
F111-F114: UI Integration ⏳ Pending
F115-F117: Polish         ⏳ Pending
```

### POC Reference
- Location: `design/reference/semantic-zoom-poc.html`
- Status: ✅ Working (0 console errors)
- Purpose: Visual reference only

---

## Key Technical Notes

### React + R3F Version Pairing
```
React 18 → @react-three/fiber@8.x + @react-three/drei@9.x
React 19 → @react-three/fiber@9.x + @react-three/drei@10.x
```
BlueprintJS 6 requires React 18, so we use R3F 8.x.

### Running the App
```bash
cd apps/canvas && bun run dev
# Opens http://localhost:5173
```

### Visual Testing Protocol
Use Playwright MCP (runs headless, won't steal focus):
```
1. mcp__playwright__browser_navigate
2. mcp__playwright__browser_console_messages
3. mcp__playwright__browser_take_screenshot
4. Analyze screenshot
5. mcp__playwright__browser_close
```

---

## Session Notes Template

```
### Session YYYY-MM-DD #N
**Focus:** [Brief description]

**Completed:**
- [Task 1]
- [Task 2]

**Blocked/Issues:**
- [Issue if any]

**Next Session:**
- [Priority 1]
- [Priority 2]
```
</content>
</document>
</result>

<invoke name="Read">

</invoke>
</function_calls>
<result>
<document>
<source>file</source>
<title>features.json</title>
<content>
{
  "project": "MMS System",
  "description": "Metro Integrated Planning System - Production App",
  "features": [
    {
      "id": "F101",
      "name": "Vite + React 18 Setup",
      "description": "Create apps/canvas with Vite, React 18.3.1, TypeScript",
      "acceptance": "Dev server runs, React renders, TypeScript compiles",
      "passes": true,
      "phase": "foundation"
    },
    {
      "id": "F102",
      "name": "BlueprintJS 6 Integration",
      "description": "Add @blueprintjs/core 6.x, configure styles, create layout shell",
      "acceptance": "Navbar renders with BlueprintJS styling, no console errors",
      "passes": true,
      "phase": "foundation"
    },
    {
      "id": "F103",
      "name": "R3F Integration",
      "description": "Add @react-three/fiber 8.x, @react-three/drei 9.x, three 0.170.x",
      "acceptance": "Canvas renders, OrthographicCamera works, no version conflicts",
      "passes": true,
      "phase": "foundation"
    },
    {
      "id": "F104",
      "name": "Data Types and Generator",
      "description": "Create Train, Task, TaskRender types and mock data generator",
      "acceptance": "Generator creates 50 trains, 10 years of tasks, types compile",
      "passes": true,
      "phase": "foundation"
    },
    {
      "id": "F105",
      "name": "MesoLayer Rendering",
      "description": "InstancedMesh rendering of tasks as colored blocks",
      "acceptance": "60k instances render at 60fps, colors match task types",
      "passes": false,
      "phase": "core-rendering"
    },
    {
      "id": "F106",
      "name": "Camera Pan/Zoom",
      "description": "CameraController with mouse drag pan and scroll zoom",
      "acceptance": "Smooth pan/zoom, zoom centers on cursor, boundaries respected",
      "passes": false,
      "phase": "core-rendering"
    },
    {
      "id": "F107",
      "name": "LOD State Management",
      "description": "useViewport hook managing zoom, pan, LOD level transitions",
      "acceptance": "LOD transitions at correct thresholds (0.5, 2.0), state persists",
      "passes": false,
      "phase": "core-rendering"
    },
    {
      "id": "F108",
      "name": "MacroLayer Heatmap",
      "description": "Shader-based heatmap for zoom < 0.5",
      "acceptance": "Yellow→orange→red gradient based on task density, smooth transition",
      "passes": false,
      "phase": "lod-layers"
    },
    {
      "id": "F109",
      "name": "MicroLayer HTML",
      "description": "drei Html overlay for zoom > 2.0 with task cards",
      "acceptance": "Task cards visible with labels, positioned correctly, accessible",
      "passes": false,
      "phase": "lod-layers"
    },
    {
      "id": "F110",
      "name": "LOD Transitions",
      "description": "Smooth crossfade between LOD layers",
      "acceptance": "No flickering during transitions, opacity animates smoothly",
      "passes": false,
      "phase": "lod-layers"
    },
    {
      "id": "F111",
      "name": "Train Sidebar",
      "description": "BlueprintJS Card sidebar with train IDs, synced with panY",
      "acceptance": "Train IDs visible, scroll syncs with canvas pan, highlights work",
      "passes": false,
      "phase": "ui-integration"
    },
    {
      "id": "F112",
      "name": "Timeline Header",
      "description": "Adaptive timeline showing dates with zoom-appropriate granularity",
      "acceptance": "Shows years at macro, months at meso, days at micro zoom",
      "passes": false,
      "phase": "ui-integration"
    },
    {
      "id": "F113",
      "name": "Zoom Controls",
      "description": "BlueprintJS ButtonGroup with +/- zoom and reset",
      "acceptance": "Buttons work, zoom indicator shows current level, reset works",
      "passes": false,
      "phase": "ui-integration"
    },
    {
      "id": "F114",
      "name": "Conflict Indicators",
      "description": "Visual indicators for tasks with hasConflict=true",
      "acceptance": "Conflict tasks show red border/highlight in all LOD layers",
      "passes": false,
      "phase": "ui-integration"
    },
    {
      "id": "F115",
      "name": "Onboarding Instructions",
      "description": "Auto-hiding toast with pan/zoom instructions",
      "acceptance": "Instructions appear on load, dismiss after 5s or on interaction",
      "passes": false,
      "phase": "polish"
    },
    {
      "id": "F116",
      "name": "Performance Optimization",
      "description": "Ensure 60fps with 60k tasks, optimize memory usage",
      "acceptance": "Consistent 60fps during pan/zoom, no memory leaks, <100MB heap",
      "passes": false,
      "phase": "polish"
    },
    {
      "id": "F117",
      "name": "Visual Parity with POC",
      "description": "Match POC visual appearance (colors, spacing, typography)",
      "acceptance": "Side-by-side comparison shows visual match with POC",
      "passes": false,
      "phase": "polish"
    }
  ],
  "phases": {
    "foundation": {
      "name": "Foundation",
      "description": "Vite + React 18 + BlueprintJS + R3F setup",
      "status": "complete"
    },
    "core-rendering": {
      "name": "Core Rendering",
      "description": "Data, MesoLayer, pan/zoom, LOD state",
      "status": "in-progress"
    },
    "lod-layers": {
      "name": "LOD Layers",
      "description": "MacroLayer, MicroLayer, transitions",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    "ui-integration": {
      "name": "UI Integration",
      "description": "Sidebar, timeline, controls, conflicts",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    "polish": {
      "name": "Polish",
      "description": "Instructions, performance, visual parity",
      "status": "pending"
    }
  }
}
</content>
</document>
</result>

I now understand the current state:

**Current Status:**
- Foundation phase (F101-F104) is complete
- Core Rendering phase (F105-F107) is next - MesoLayer, Camera Pan/Zoom, LOD State Management
- Production app is at `apps/canvas/`
- Dev server: `cd apps/canvas && bun run dev`

**Key Technical Context:**
- React 18.3.1 + BlueprintJS 6 + R3F 8.x + drei 9.x + Three.js 0.170.x
- Semantic Zoom UX with 3 LOD levels (Macro < 0.5, Meso 0.5-2.0, Micro > 2.0)
- 50 trains, 10 years of tasks (~6000 tasks)
- Playwright MCP available for visual testing (headless mode)

The project is ready for the next development session to implement core rendering features (F105-F107).
